assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks: Task 1 (create-branch), Task 3 (model/service), Task 4 (endpoint), Task 8 (merge-branch) — all have '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'. Frontend tasks: Task 2 (create-branch), Task 5 (API types/hook), Task 6 (page UI), Task 7 (route/action), Task 9 (merge-branch) — all have '## Repository\ntrustify-ui'. 4 backend tasks and 5 frontend tasks.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend implementation tasks are Tasks 3 and 4. Frontend implementation tasks are Tasks 5, 6, and 7. Task 5 (frontend) explicitly depends on Task 4 (backend): 'Depends on: Task 4 -- Add SBOM comparison endpoint and integration tests'. All backend work tasks (3, 4) have lower numbers than dependent frontend tasks (5, 6, 7).

assertion_results.text: UI-facing frontend tasks (pages, components) reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications — API-layer frontend tasks (API types, client functions, hooks) are exempt from this requirement
assertion_results.evidence: Task 6 (SbomComparePage) has extensive Figma design mapping in Implementation Notes: PatternFly Select (typeahead), Button (primary), Dropdown (secondary), ExpandableSection, Badge with colors (green/red/blue/yellow), Table (composable), EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon, Skeleton placeholders, specific column definitions per section, critical-severity row highlighting. Task 7 references PatternFly Table row selection and Button for the compare action. Task 5 (API types/hook) is an API-layer task and does not reference Figma, which is correct per the exemption.

assertion_results.text: Cross-repo dependency ordering is enforced: either at least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section, or all tasks target a shared feature branch where backend tasks have lower task numbers than frontend tasks (implicit ordering via feature-branch workflow)
assertion_results.evidence: Task 5 (trustify-ui) explicitly depends on Task 4 (trustify-backend) in its Dependencies section: 'Depends on: Task 4 -- Add SBOM comparison endpoint and integration tests (backend endpoint must exist for integration)'. This is a direct cross-repo dependency from frontend to backend.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md: Task 3 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs and modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs (both in manifest). Task 4 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (in manifest). Implementation Notes reference modules/fundamental/src/package/service/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/advisory/service/advisory.rs, common/src/error.rs (all in manifest). Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md: Task 5 modifies src/api/models.ts, src/api/rest.ts (both in manifest), references src/api/client.ts, src/hooks/useSboms.ts, src/hooks/useSbomById.ts (all in manifest). Task 6 references src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx, src/components/EmptyStateCard.tsx, src/components/LoadingSpinner.tsx, src/pages/SbomDetailPage/SbomDetailPage.tsx (all in manifest). Task 7 modifies src/routes.tsx, src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx (both in manifest).

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 9 tasks have '## Repository' as first section with a single name: Tasks 1, 3, 4, 8 have 'trustify-backend'; Tasks 2, 5, 6, 7, 9 have 'trustify-ui'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 9 tasks contain: '## Target Branch' (Task 1: main, Task 2: main, Tasks 3-7: TC-9003, Task 8: main, Task 9: main), '## Description' (present in all), '## Acceptance Criteria' (present in all with checkbox items), '## Test Requirements' (present in all with checkbox items).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Files to Modify all reference existing manifest paths: Task 3 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs and modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs (both in repo-backend.md tree). Task 4 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (in repo-backend.md). Task 5 modifies src/api/models.ts and src/api/rest.ts (both in repo-frontend.md). Task 7 modifies src/routes.tsx and src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx (both in repo-frontend.md). Files to Create follow existing directory patterns from manifests: Task 3 creates files under modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ and service/ (directories in manifest). Task 4 creates under modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ and tests/api/ (directories in manifest). Task 5 creates under src/hooks/ (directory in manifest). Task 6 creates under src/pages/ following the SbomDetailPage/ subdirectory pattern.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every non-bookend task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance — bookend tasks (create-branch, merge-branch) are exempt as they omit Implementation Notes by design
assertion_results.evidence: Bookend tasks (1, 2, 8, 9) have no Implementation Notes section — correctly exempt. Non-bookend tasks all have specific references: Task 3 references PackageService from modules/fundamental/src/package/service/mod.rs, AdvisoryService from modules/fundamental/src/advisory/service/advisory.rs, PackageSummary from modules/fundamental/src/package/model/summary.rs, AdvisorySummary from modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs. Task 4 references endpoints/get.rs handler pattern, endpoints/mod.rs Router builder, AppError::BadRequest/NotFound. Task 5 references src/api/models.ts, src/api/rest.ts, src/api/client.ts, src/hooks/useSboms.ts, src/hooks/useSbomById.ts patterns. Task 6 has detailed Figma design mapping with specific PatternFly components and references src/pages/SbomDetailPage/SbomDetailPage.tsx, src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx, src/components/EmptyStateCard.tsx, src/components/LoadingSpinner.tsx. Task 7 references src/routes.tsx React.lazy() pattern, SbomListPage.tsx, FilterToolbar.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section — either all set to 'main' (direct-to-main workflow) or bookend tasks set to 'main' with intermediate tasks set to the feature issue ID (feature-branch workflow)
assertion_results.evidence: Feature-branch workflow used correctly. Bookend tasks on 'main': Task 1 (create-branch, Target Branch: main), Task 2 (create-branch, Target Branch: main), Task 8 (merge-branch, Target Branch: main), Task 9 (merge-branch, Target Branch: main). Intermediate tasks on feature branch: Task 3 (Target Branch: TC-9003), Task 4 (Target Branch: TC-9003), Task 5 (Target Branch: TC-9003), Task 6 (Target Branch: TC-9003), Task 7 (Target Branch: TC-9003).

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string
assertion_results.evidence: All 9 digest files present with valid format. Each contains '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:' followed by exactly 64 lowercase hex characters. Verified programmatically: all 9 hashes pass regex ^[0-9a-f]{64}$ check. Example: digest-task-1.md contains sha256-md:c2c09ea3856beb369c0020a92141e08b643f4439f175bd25a9ae433ad18777e9.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: All convention references use the prescribed format. Task 3: 'Per CONVENTIONS.md §Error Handling...Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/compare.rs matching the convention's .rs scope.' Task 4: Error Handling convention with 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/compare.rs matching the convention's .rs scope' and Test Patterns with 'Applies: task creates tests/api/sbom_compare.rs matching the convention's .rs test file scope.' Task 5: Mutation pattern with 'Applies: task creates src/hooks/useSbomComparison.ts matching the convention's .ts scope.' Task 6: Component naming with 'Applies: task creates src/pages/SbomComparePage/SbomComparePage.tsx matching the convention's .tsx scope' and MSW mocking with 'Applies: task creates src/pages/SbomComparePage/SbomComparePage.test.tsx matching the convention's .ts test file scope.' Task 7: Component naming with 'Applies: task modifies src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx matching the convention's .tsx scope.' No inapplicable conventions are listed with 'Not applicable' annotations anywhere.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a priority set (not 'Undefined'), every created task's additional_fields includes 'priority' with the inherited priority name
assertion_results.evidence: Feature priority is Critical. All 9 tasks include '## Additional Fields' with 'priority: Critical': Task 1 (line 23), Task 2 (line 23), Task 3 (line 62), Task 4 (line 58), Task 5 (line 48), Task 6 (line 76), Task 7 (line 47), Task 8 (line 27), Task 9 (line 27).

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a non-empty fixVersions array and the fixVersion scope config is 'task' or 'both' (or absent, defaulting to 'both'), every created task's additional_fields includes 'fixVersions' with the inherited version(s)
assertion_results.evidence: Feature fixVersions: RHTPA 1.5.0. No Jira Field Defaults in CLAUDE.md, so scope defaults to 'both'. All 9 tasks include 'fixVersions: RHTPA 1.5.0' in their Additional Fields section: Task 1 (line 24), Task 2 (line 24), Task 3 (line 63), Task 4 (line 59), Task 5 (line 49), Task 6 (line 77), Task 7 (line 48), Task 8 (line 28), Task 9 (line 28).

assertion_results.text: The summary comment on the feature issue (Step 6c) includes the inherited priority and fixVersion values that were propagated to tasks, or states they were omitted and why
assertion_results.evidence: summary-comment.md contains '- Priority: Critical (propagated to all tasks)' and '- Fix Versions: RHTPA 1.5.0 (propagated to all tasks)' under the '### Field Propagation' section.
